title: taraxacum majus
intro: Taraxacum majus, also known as the large dandelion, is a plant species that belongs to the sunflower family (Asteraceae) and is native to Europe, North Africa, and Western Asia. The medicinal properties of Taraxacum majus lie in its roots, leaves, and flowers, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has anti-inflammatory properties, making it beneficial for digestive health, reducing blood pressure, and supporting liver function. Taraxacum majus can be prepared into herbal teas, capsules, or tinctures, which are commonly consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties and health benefits.
